description: Dialogue procedure: one NPC conversation tree attached to a task. Five talk_proc records are always written per task (indices 0–4), even if unused (in which case num_window will be 0). Source: TaskDataSmallTool/ZElementData/ExpTypes.h and its load functions.

serialized_layout.name: text
serialized_layout.description: NPC dialogue text, UTF-16LE fixed 64-character array.

serialized_layout.name: num_window
serialized_layout.description: Number of dialogue windows in this conversation.

serialized_layout.name: windows
serialized_layout.description: Variable-length array of talk_window records. See talk_window.json.

notes: All 5 slots are written unconditionally. An unused slot has id_talk=0 and num_window=0, costing only 4+128+4=136 bytes.
Sanity check: num_window > 1000 is treated as corrupt by the PHP reader.
